untranslatable_reason: Kaufman Efficiency Ratio is not available in the allowed indicators list. This metric requires custom calculation and cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (ADX, RSI, ATR, Moving Averages, etc.). Additionally, the range-bound setup logic (support/resistance detection, breakout beyond established range, 50% of average range profit target) requires dynamic range identification which is not directly available in the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires Kaufman Efficiency Ratio (KER) for sideways detection, which is not in the allowed indicator set. Partially translated using ADX as a trend strength proxy (ADX > 15 for trending, ADX < 12 for exit). The range-bound component and ATR percentile requirements cannot be fully expressed with available indicators. Recommend adding Kaufman Efficiency Ratio or using price_pos_20 with Donchian channels as alternative range detection methods.
